packages.name: Data Frontier Footprint Generator
packages.description: Generate KiCad footprints, symbols and 3D models from YAML definitions.
packages.description_full: Data Frontier is a parametric EDA component generator. Describe a component once in a small YAML file and generate the KiCad footprint (.kicad_mod), schematic symbol (.kicad_sym) and 3D STEP model in one shot, validated against IPC-7351B before anything is written. Supports 7 pad patterns (axial/radial/dual PTH, dual/quad SMD, custom, BGA) and exports to KiCad, Eagle and Altium.
